title: hieracium segureum subsp. exilentoides
intro: Hieracium segureum subsp. exilentoides, commonly known as a lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed family. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium segureum subsp. exilentoides include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Hieracium segureum subsp. exilentoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is often harvested in its fresh or dried form for herbal preparations.
